tasks.title: Implement ESI Severity Scoring Tags
tasks.desc: Automate ESI automated EHR level tags upon patient intake to accelerate ED triage workflow velocity.

tasks.title: Decrease Triage-to-Bed Time
tasks.desc: Decrease median triage-to-bed allocation latency under 18 minutes baseline. Audit flow protocols.

tasks.title: Live Care Journey Tracker UI
tasks.desc: Build strategic gateway for real-time patient lab visibility, physician schedule updates, and SMS notifications.

tasks.title: Interactive Room Transition Map
tasks.desc: Map transition parameters from Emergency ED to Operating Recovery and post-acute wards dynamically.

tasks.title: Automated Discharge Enablement
tasks.desc: Streamline discharge planning, including coordinated pharmacy prescriptions and post-acute transit slots.

tasks.title: Digital SBAR Care Team Checklist
tasks.desc: Build clinical handoff verification checklist prior to transferring triage patients out of the ED.
